title: Sign in and reach the protected workspace
description: Verifies a user can sign in from the login page and land in the main authenticated workspace where modules are accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands in the main authenticated workspace
Verify module navigation is visible from the workspace

title: Create a new expense and see it in the transaction list
description: Verifies an admin can create a new expense transaction and it becomes visible in the transaction list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the transactions module from the workspace navigation
Start creating a new transaction entry
Select Expense as the transaction type
Fill 123.45 into the amount field
Fill Test expense into the description or notes field
Save the new transaction
Verify the new transaction appears in the transaction list

title: Capture and save daily attendance for multiple employees
description: Verifies a field supervisor can record attendance for multiple employees, save it, and see the attendance reflected in the daily attendance list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Workforce module
Open the daily attendance entry view
Add attendance entries for at least two employees with valid attendance values
Save the attendance entry
Verify the saved attendance entries are displayed in the daily attendance list

title: Admin can create, edit, and delete an expense transaction from the main workspace
description: Verifies an Admin can reach Transactions from the dashboard, create an expense, edit it, and delete it with the list reflecting each change.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Transactions module from the main workspace
Start creating a new Expense transaction
Fill a valid amount into the amount field
Fill a short memo into the description or notes field
Save the transaction
Open the newly created expense from the transactions list
Update the amount to a different valid value
Save the changes
Delete the expense transaction
Confirm the delete action
Verify the deleted transaction no longer appears in the transactions list

title: Field supervisor can log daily attendance for multiple employees and see it in the daily list
description: Verifies a Field supervisor can record and save attendance for multiple employees and the saved attendance appears in the daily attendance list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Workforce module from the main workspace
Open daily attendance entry for today
Mark attendance for at least two employees
Save the attendance entry
Verify the saved attendance appears in the daily attendance list for today

title: Record and save machine work, sand production, and event logs
description: Verifies a field supervisor can record machine work, sand production, and event logs, save them, and see them appear in the daily activity list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Workforce module
Open the daily logs entry view
Add a machine work log with valid machine and work details
Add a sand production log with valid quantity details
Add an event log with a valid note
Save the daily logs
Verify the newly saved logs are displayed in the daily activity list

title: Dashboard shows operational overview and allows navigation to a module
description: Verifies the dashboard displays summary information and a quick action can navigate into a core module from the workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard from the main app
Click a dashboard quick action to open a core module
Verify summary cards or key metrics are displayed on the dashboard
Verify the selected module view opens from the dashboard action

title: Field supervisor can add machine work, sand production, and event logs and see them in activity
description: Verifies a Field supervisor can add and save machine work, sand production, and event logs and the entries appear in the activity list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Workforce module from the main workspace
Open daily logs entry for today
Add a machine work log with valid required values
Add a sand production log with valid required values
Add an event log with a short note
Save the daily logs
Verify the new daily log entries appear in the activity list for today

title: Edit an existing transaction and see updated values in the list
description: Verifies a user can edit a transaction and the list reflects the updated transaction values.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the transactions module from the workspace navigation
Create a new transaction entry for later editing
Select Expense as the transaction type
Fill 50.00 into the amount field
Fill Editable expense into the description or notes field
Save the new transaction
Select the newly created transaction from the list to edit
Fill 75.00 into the amount field
Save the changes
Verify the transaction list shows the updated amount for the edited transaction

title: Delete a transaction and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete an existing transaction and it no longer appears in the transaction list after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the transactions module from the workspace navigation
Create a new transaction entry for later deletion
Select Expense as the transaction type
Fill 10.00 into the amount field
Fill Deletable expense into the description or notes field
Save the new transaction
Delete the newly created transaction
Confirm the deletion
Verify the deleted transaction no longer appears in the transaction list

title: Generate payroll for a selected period and review the snapshot
description: Verifies a payroll admin can generate payroll for a selected period and view the resulting snapshot with computed components.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Payroll module
Select a valid payroll period
Generate payroll for the selected period
Open the generated payroll snapshot view
Verify payroll snapshot rows are displayed for employees
Verify computed pay components such as base pay, overtime, allowances, and deductions are displayed

title: Payroll/HR admin can generate payroll for a period and view the payroll snapshot
description: Verifies a Payroll/HR admin can generate payroll for a selected period and the snapshot shows computed payroll components.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Payroll module from the main workspace
Select a valid payroll period
Generate payroll for the selected period
Verify a payroll snapshot is displayed with computed components for employees

title: Create a new employee with wage type and position
description: Verifies a payroll/HR admin can create an employee profile with wage type and position and see the employee listed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Employee Management module
Start creating a new employee
Fill in the employee name with a unique value
Select a valid wage type
Select a valid position
Save the employee profile
Verify the new employee appears in the employee list

title: Payroll period lock blocks edits and unlock allows edits again
description: Verifies locking a payroll period prevents edits with a visible restriction message and unlocking restores the ability to edit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Payroll module from the main workspace
Select a valid payroll period
Generate payroll for the selected period
Lock the payroll period
Attempt to edit a payroll value within the locked snapshot
Verify an edit restriction message is displayed indicating the period is locked
Unlock the payroll period
Attempt to edit a payroll value again
Verify payroll values can be edited after the period is unlocked

title: Lock a payroll period after generation
description: Verifies a payroll admin can lock a generated payroll period and the period shows as locked in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Payroll module
Select a valid payroll period
Generate payroll for the selected period
Lock the payroll period
Verify the selected payroll period is shown as locked

title: Dashboard period-based view navigates to a related detail area
description: Verifies interacting with a period-based trend/summary on the dashboard can take the user to a related transactions or payroll area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard from the main app
Inspect a period-based trend or summary card
Use the dashboard action to navigate to the related detail area
Verify the related detail area for transactions or payroll is displayed
Verify the dashboard interaction resulted in navigation to the related area

title: Block edits to payroll entries when the period is locked
description: Verifies that after locking a payroll period, attempts to edit payroll entries are blocked and a lock restriction message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Payroll module
Select a valid payroll period
Generate payroll for the selected period
Lock the payroll period
Attempt to edit a payroll entry within the locked period
Verify a lock restriction message is visible
Verify the payroll entry edit is not applied

title: Update an employee wage type or position
description: Verifies a payroll/HR admin can update an existing employee’s wage type or position and the updated details are reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Employee Management module
Start creating a new employee
Fill in the employee name with a unique value
Select a valid wage type
Select a valid position
Save the employee profile
Open the created employee profile for editing
Change the wage type or position to a different valid value
Save the changes
Verify the employee list reflects the updated wage type or position for that employee

title: Filter or review transactions list without breaking list visibility
description: Verifies a user can use available filtering/review controls on the transactions list and the list remains usable and visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the transactions module from the workspace navigation
Use available filter controls to narrow the transaction list
Verify the transaction list remains visible and displays results consistent with the selected filters

title: Land project admin can create a land project and see it listed
description: Verifies a Land project admin can create a land project with required seller and payment details and see it listed in the land projects view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the land project module from the main workspace
Start creating a new land project
Fill seller details with valid values
Fill deed details with valid values
Fill a valid area value
Fill valid payment values
Save the land project
Verify the new land project appears in the land project list

title: Land project admin can advance project status through Deposit to PaidFull to Transferred with notes retained
description: Verifies a land project can be progressed through key lifecycle statuses with notes and the status history or notes remain visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the land project module from the main workspace
Start creating a new land project
Fill seller details with valid values
Fill deed details with valid values
Fill a valid area value
Fill valid payment values
Save the land project
Open the newly created land project
Update the project status to Deposit
Add a status note about payment progress
Save the project update
Update the project status to PaidFull
Save the project update
Update the project status to Transferred
Save the project update
Verify the project shows the latest status and the earlier notes or status history remain visible

title: Prevent saving attendance with missing required fields
description: Verifies the attendance form blocks saving when required inputs are missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Workforce module
Open the daily attendance entry view
Attempt to save the attendance entry without completing required fields
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the attendance entry is not saved to the daily attendance list

title: Admin can add a master data list entry and it becomes available for selection in forms
description: Verifies an Admin can add a new master data item and it appears as an option in a relevant form dropdown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open settings or administration from the main workspace
Open configurable lists or master data management
Add a new list entry with a unique name
Save the master data changes
Return to the main workspace
Open the Transactions module from the main workspace
Start creating a new transaction
Open the relevant category or master-data dropdown
Verify the newly added master data entry is available as a selectable option

title: Invalid credentials are blocked with an error
description: Verifies that submitting the login form with incorrect credentials does not create a session and shows an invalid-credentials error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid_user into the username or credential field
Fill invalid_password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid-credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Prevent saving daily logs with missing required fields
description: Verifies daily logs entry blocks saving when required fields are missing and displays a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Workforce module
Open the daily logs entry view
Add a new log entry but leave a required field empty
Attempt to save the daily logs
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the daily activity list does not show a newly created log entry

title: Admin can update organization profile settings and see the changes persist
description: Verifies an Admin can update organization profile or defaults in Settings and the updated settings are shown after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open settings or administration from the main workspace
Open organization profile or defaults
Update an organization profile field with a new valid value
Save the settings
Verify the updated organization setting is displayed as saved

title: Prevent saving an employee profile with missing required fields
description: Verifies the employee creation form blocks saving when required fields are missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
From the main workspace, open the Employee Management module
Start creating a new employee
Attempt to save the employee profile without completing required fields
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the employee is not added to the employee list

title: Admin can create an admin user account and see it in the admin user list
description: Verifies an Admin can create a new admin account and the new user appears in the user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open settings or administration from the main workspace
Open admin user management
Start creating a new admin user account
Fill user identity fields with valid values
Fill a valid password for the new account if required by the form
Save the new admin user
Verify the newly created admin user appears in the admin user list

title: Session persists after page refresh in authenticated workspace
description: Verifies that after successful login, refreshing the browser keeps the user in an authenticated state and the workspace remains accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify authenticated workspace is loaded
Refresh the browser page
Verify user remains authenticated and still sees workspace modules after refresh

title: Logout clears session and blocks access to protected workspace
description: Verifies logging out ends the session and protected workspace routes are no longer accessible without re-login.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Use the logout control from the authenticated workspace
Verify the app returns to login or unauthenticated state
Attempt to open the protected workspace route directly
Verify access is blocked and user is redirected to login

title: Recalculate payroll snapshot after changing attendance input
description: Verifies payroll recalculation updates computed components after attendance data is changed before period lock.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open Workforce and create or update attendance for a selected employee and period
Open Payroll and generate payroll for the same period
Capture a computed value such as overtime or net pay for the selected employee
Return to Workforce and change attendance inputs affecting payroll
Regenerate payroll for the same period
Verify the selected employee payroll components are updated to reflect changed attendance

title: Create weekly plan and mark it done
description: Verifies a user can create a weekly plan task, mark it done, and see status updated in planning view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username or credential field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the Planning module from the workspace
Create a new plan with Weekly scope and valid task details
Save the new plan
Mark the created plan status as Done
Verify the planning list shows the plan with Done status
